ddls:
CREATE TABLE "personal_info_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Personal and online identifiers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is mandatory for collection */,
  "compliance_regulation" TEXT /* Specifies relevant data protection regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collection_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method (e.g., Online forms) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is online */,
  "is_secure" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method ensures secure data transmission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source (e.g., Website, Social media) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "is_integrated" INTEGER /* Indicates if the source is integrated with the company's systems */,
  "data_quality" INTEGER /* Rating of the data quality from the source (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "purposes" (
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each purpose */,
  "purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the purpose (e.g., Marketing, Advertising) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the purpose */,
  "is_opt_in_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if customer opt-in is required for this purpose */,
  "retention_period" INTEGER /* Number of days the collected data is retained for this purpose */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "third_party_categories" (
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each third party category */,
  "third_party_name" TEXT /* Name of the third party category (e.g., Service providers) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the third party category */,
  "is_contracted" INTEGER /* Indicates if there is a contract with the third party */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status of the third party (e.g., compliant, non-compliant) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("third_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer account is active */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Current consent status (e.g., given, withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "personal_info_collection" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the information */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category of information collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the method used to collect the information */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of the information */,
  "purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the purpose for collecting the information */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Date the information was collected */,
  "data_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of data collected */,
  "data_quality_score" REAL /* Score indicating the quality of the collected data */,
  "is_anonymized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is anonymized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_info_collection_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_info_collection_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_info_collection_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("purpose_id") REFERENCES purposes ("purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_info_collection_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES collection_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_personal_info_collection_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES personal_info_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disclosures" (
  "disclosure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disclosure event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose information was disclosed */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third party category that received the information */,
  "disclosed_at" TEXT /* Date the information was disclosed */,
  "data_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of data disclosed */,
  "is_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the disclosure is allowed based on customer consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disclosure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disclosures_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disclosures_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_party_categories ("third_party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer whose information was sold */,
  "third_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the third party category that purchased the information */,
  "sold_at" TEXT /* Date the information was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the data was sold */,
  "is_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sale is allowed based on customer consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_third_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("third_party_id") REFERENCES third_party_categories ("third_party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_subject_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., access, deletion) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the request was responded to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_subject_requests_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opt_outs" (
  "opt_out_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opt-out event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who opted out */,
  "opt_out_date" TEXT /* Date the customer opted out */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for opting out */,
  "is_permanent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the opt-out is permanent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opt_out_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opt_outs_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection event */,
  "metric" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., count, sum) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timeframe" TEXT /* Timeframe for the metric (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the analytics data (e.g., internal, third-party) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES personal_info_collection ("collection_id")
)
